CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAl(Account.Donor_Conf_Certs__c, "Active"), "Conf Certs,", '') & IF( ISPICKVAl(Account.Donor_Letter_1__c, "Active"), " Fund Appeal,", '') & IF( ISPICKVAl(Account.Donor_Fund_Events__c , "Active"), " Fund Events,", '') & IF( ISPICKVAl(Account.Donor_Gifts__c, "Active"), " Gifts,", '') & IF( ISPICKVAl(Account.Donor_Info_Mail_Update__c, "Active"), " Info Mail Update,", '') & IF( ISPICKVAl(Account.Donor_Ministry_Reports__c , "Active"), " Ministry Reports,", '')
CustomField.label: Donor Active Mail Merge Lists
